title: Category & Marketing Analyst
required_skills: 2-5 years e-commerce / marketing operations / commercial strategy experience
bonus_skills: Performance marketing fundamentals (Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates)
matched_skills: Analytical and data-handling skills (SQL, Python, Power BI, campaign ROI analytics)
Budget variance analysis and spend attribution (HSBC)
missing_skills: Performance marketing channel hands-on experience (Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates)
Consumer electronics or SDA domain knowledge
core_responsibilities: Drive multi-category growth: support prioritization and budget allocation across categories and markets
Coordinate with Demand Planning, Category Managers, CRM, Performance Marketing, Product, and Commercial teams
Strengthen commercial foundations for marketing strategies across categories, markets, and performance channels
recommended_emphasis: Highlight e-commerce analytics experience at Moli Media — funnel analysis, audience data, revenue attribution
Emphasize multi-workstream coordination skills (HSBC 6-workstream programme, Hapag-Lloyd agile coordination)
Showcase budget allocation and spend tracking analytics from HSBC digital transformation programme
Lead with multi-market experience (EMEA, APAC) to support cross-market category growth narrative
Frame campaign ROI analytics and KPI framework design as transferable to performance channel measurement
Mention marketplace context from ECE Group (marketplace/real estate sector) to bridge to refurbed's marketplace model
